# banned_tokens.txt — enthusiasm adjectives + sunk-cost / founder-commitment phrasing.
# SHARED between scripts/make_brief.py (which STRIPS these) and the neutral-brief validator
# (test_neutral_brief, which FLAGS them). Because make_brief strips this exact list, a brief it
# produces passes the validator's banned-token check by construction (reference §8 step 4).
#
# Format: one token or phrase per line; '#' comments and blank lines are ignored.
# Matching is case-insensitive, whole-word/phrase.
#
# Keep DOMAIN-LEGIT terms OFF this list — banning a word that legitimately appears in a real
# hypothesis (e.g. "viral", "real", "owned", "zero", "proprietary", "materially") would corrupt
# the brief by deleting substance. This list is for FOUNDER ENTHUSIASM and SUNK-COST framing only.

# --- enthusiasm / hype adjectives ---
revolutionary
unique
huge
massive
game-changing
game changer
groundbreaking
disruptive
cutting-edge
world-class
best-in-class
unprecedented
incredible
amazing
insanely
mind-blowing
next-generation
state-of-the-art
unbeatable
unparalleled
no-brainer
obviously
clearly the best

# --- sunk-cost / founder-commitment phrasing ---
already built
already invested
we've built
we have built
i've built
i have built
poured months
spent months
months of work
our existing
my existing
